reviews.review_title: 💰 Who Wants to Be the Next VR Tycoon?
reviews.review_description:
Who wants to be a VR billionaire? In Billionaires Show, you finally can! From the moment you step onto the stage as a contestant, you’re immersed in a lively game show atmosphere — complete with a cheering crowd and a charismatic master of ceremony that really sets the tone.

The pacing is just right, keeping you engaged and motivated to try again after each round. I actually learned a few things along the way, which makes it not just fun but surprisingly educational. I managed to answer 11 questions — and I can only imagine the tension when you’re pushing close to 30!

It’s a great mix of general knowledge and entertainment, perfect for short gaming sessions or testing your trivia under pressure. The studio is already teasing new updates, so definitely stay tuned for more challenges and features.

reviews.review_title: You get to look at the title screen
reviews.review_description: You can’t actually get into the game, big red flag as far as I’m concerned when it comes to games.

developer_response.body:
Hi 2ToneEric, thank you for your feedback and for taking the time to try Billionaires Show! We're sorry to hear about the issue you're experiencing with accessing the game.

The game has been thoroughly tested and has a very stable performance record with no reported crashes. In some cases, similar issues can arise due to device storage limitations, outdated software, or other local settings.

We recommend checking the following:

Ensure you have sufficient storage space available on your device.
Make sure your Oculus device and app are updated to the latest versions.
Restart your device and try launching the game again.
We're also excited to announce that the 2.0 version of Billionaires Show is rolling out soon! This update will include multiplayer functionality and new challenges, adding an intense and dynamic layer to the experience beyond just answering questions. Stay tuned for an even more engaging gameplay experience!

If the issue persists, please don't hesitate to reach out to our support team at vrdev@spontan.agency, and we’ll be happy to assist you further. We want to ensure you have the best possible experience with Billionaires Show.

Thank you for your support, and we can’t wait for you to explore everything the game has to offer!

reviews.review_title: FINALLY! A game show on Quest!
reviews.review_description:
I have been a game show junkie my entire life so grabbed this game as soon as I saw it. It is exactly what you expect it to be!! The game is superbly done and so much fun to play. I hope to see more game shows in VR in the future!

Answer 30 questions and become a BILLIONAIRE! Sounds easy enough but the questions are pretty challenging! You will truly test your wit, but thankfully you have 4 superpowers to help you- 50/50, ask the audience, change question, and next question but use them wisely! There are also ways to earn or purchase coins to gain even more superpowers too. While this is a single player game, I think casting to the TV and having the entire family help is so much fun...and now we know who is smarter in the family! LOL 

Add this to your family fun night or test your smarts solo, either way- I think everyone will enjoy this game!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your enthusiastic 5-star review of Billionaires Show! We're thrilled to hear that you're enjoying the game and that it lives up to your game show expectations. It's fantastic to have a dedicated game show enthusiast like you in our community!

It's heartwarming to hear that you've turned Billionaires Show into a fun family activity. Gathering around and involving the whole family in the quest for knowledge is an amazing way to bond and compete. And who doesn't enjoy a little friendly competition to find out who the family's smarty is?

Once again, thank you for recommending Billionaires Show for family fun nights and solo challenges. We appreciate your support and are committed to delivering even more engaging experiences in the future.

reviews.review_title: I finally got to be on a TV Game Show!
reviews.review_description:
As someone who grew up watching game shows, hearing about this game was super exciting!

If you've ever wanted to know what it's like to be on a TV game show, download this game immediately... you can thank me later!

developer_response.body: Thanks a billion for your awesome 5-star review! We're thrilled you're having a blast with Billionaires Show. Keep having fun and stay tuned for more exciting updates!

reviews.review_description:
What a cool quiz game! It's just like being on a TV show. Incredibly fun and challenging. It reminds me of 1 vs 100 from the early 2000's

An awesome addition would be the ability to play against other players, hopefully this is something you will consider adding at some point in the future. 

Great work devs, I'm enjoying every second 🙌

developer_response.body:
What a fantastic review, and thank you for being part of our cosmic quiz adventure! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the Billionaires Show  🌟
You've perfectly captured the essence of the game's excitement, and we're delighted to hear these words.

Your suggestion about playing against other knowledge-driven extraterrestrials is out of this world! 🌌👽 We're always looking to enhance the experience, and your idea is right up there. Stay tuned for what the future holds, as we're on a mission to give you the most realistic TV show experience ever, with real prizes and of course the multiplayer feature! 

It will come shortly in the next 2.0 version. 

Meanwhile, keep those superpowers charged and your knowledge sharp as we aim for the stars. We're here to make it a thrilling ride for you! Thanks a Billion! 🚀🧠💡

reviews.review_description: A fun and challenging experience for Quest

reviews.review_title: I've always wanted to be on a TV SHOW!!!
reviews.review_description: I've always dreamt of being part of a thrilling TV game show where I could put my knowledge to the test and have a chance to win some serious money. This game has exceeded all my expectations, providing an exhilarating experience that combines the excitement of a TV show with the thrill of trivia.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your enthusiastic and positive review! 

We share your passion for providing an exhilarating and thrilling experience to our users. It's truly gratifying to know that we've managed to exceed your expectations and deliver the excitement you've always dreamed of. Our team worked tirelessly to create a game that not only challenges your knowledge but also captures the essence of a real TV game show.

Your satisfaction is our top priority, and we'll continue to enhance the game, ensuring you have a memorable time each time you play.

If you have any suggestions or feedback on how we can make the experience even better, we'd love to hear from you. Our goal is to continuously improve and provide the best possible entertainment for all our players.

Once again, thank you for your fantastic review and for being part of our thrilling TV game show community. We're excited to have you with us on this journey!
